description: The complete binary layout for one task record as written by ATaskTempl::LoadBinary(). This is a recursive structure: each record ends with embedded sub-task records. Applies equally to top-level tasks (reachable via the pack offset table) and sub-tasks (embedded inline).

sections.name: fixed_data
sections.description: ATaskTemplFixedData block. Fixed-size, pack(1). See fixed_data.json for full field layout.

sections.name: LoadDescriptionBin
sections.description: Three UTF-16LE strings written as (uint32 char_count, char_count × uint16 codeunits): description text, ok-button text, no-button text.

sections.name: LoadTributeBin
sections.description: One UTF-16LE string (uint32 char_count, char_count × uint16): tribute/reward description shown to player.

sections.name: LoadHintTextBin
sections.description: One UTF-16LE string (uint32 char_count, char_count × uint16): in-progress hint text.

sections.name: LoadCanDeliverTextBin
sections.description: One UTF-16LE string (uint32 char_count, char_count × uint16): text shown when task can be turned in.

sections.name: LoadFixedDataFromBinFile_variable
sections.description: Variable sub-sections appended by LoadFixedDataFromBinFile, in this order: (a) signature string [uint32 len + len bytes], (b) timetable start/end arrays [2 × (uint32 count + count × task_tm(24))], (c) ChangeKeyArr [uint32 n + n×4 + n×4 + n×1], (d) PremItems [uint32 count + count × ITEM_WANTED(31)], (e) PremMonsterSummoned [uint32 count + count × MONSTER_SUMMONED(29)], (f) PremTitles [uint32 count + count × uint16], (g) GivenItems [uint32 count + count × ITEM_WANTED(31)], (h) TeamMemsWanted [uint32 count + count × TEAM_MEM_WANTED(37)], (i) PremNeedComp strings — if m_bPremNeedComp(fixed@1645)≠0: 4 strings as uint32+data each, (j) MonsterWanted [uint32 count + count × MONSTER_WANTED(22)], (k) ItemsWanted [uint32 count + count × ITEM_WANTED(31)], (l) InterObjWanted [uint32 count + count × INTEROBJ_WANTED(8)], (m) FinNeedComp strings — if m_bFinNeedComp(fixed@2277)≠0: 4 strings driven by _cur_size values at fixed offsets 2294/2330/2362/2398, (n) 8 award data blocks: Award_S, Award_F, AwByRatio_S, AwByRatio_F, AwByItems_S, AwByItems_F, AwByCount_S, AwByCount_F.

sections.name: talk_procs
sections.description: Five talk_proc structures written sequentially. See talk_proc.json.

sections.name: m_nSubCount
sections.description: Number of direct child (sub-task) records embedded immediately after this field.

sections.name: sub_tasks
sections.description: m_nSubCount recursive task_record blocks written inline. Each sub-task follows the same full LoadBinary sequence and may itself contain further sub-tasks. Maximum observed depth: ~4 levels.

notes: Compiled with MSVC #pragma pack(1), 32-bit pointers (4 bytes each).
Sub-tasks share the parent's pack number but have no entry in the offset table (pack_index = -1 in the PHP reader).
Empirically verified: 45 packs, 13,450 top-level tasks, 14,204 embedded sub-tasks = 27,654 total tasks.
